quick-smoke.label: Quick smoke test
quick-smoke.description: Fastest run to verify pipeline — ~35% of your tier.

balanced.label: Balanced benchmark
balanced.description: Middle ground for timing baselines — ~65% of tier limits.

recommended.label: Recommended for your project
recommended.description: Matched to project complexity and hardware headroom.

max-safe.label: Max safe quality
max-safe.description: Highest settings that stay within VRAM/RAM limits (~95%).
